title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with minimal setup.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: Python/JS framework that ships a first-party Ollama integration for building LLM-powered applications.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, exposing the full Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chat, code highlighting, and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollamac
summary: Native macOS SwiftUI app that wraps Ollama into a clean, menu-bar chat client.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app that streams responses from a local Ollama server.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Plug-and-play retrieval-augmented generation template using Ollama, Chroma, and LangChain.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot forwarding messages to Ollama and streaming replies back.

title: ollama-hass-addon
summary: Home Assistant add-on that installs Ollama so you can run LLMs on your edge device.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Official Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds and dev shells.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfile recipes for Llama 3, Mistral, CodeLlama, and more.

title: ollama-on-termux
summary: Guide and scripts to compile and run Ollama on Android via Termux (no root).

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate providing typed endpoints for chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and dependency-injection friendly client for Ollama with Blazor sample.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app exposing Ollama as an async REST endpoint with built-in rate limiting.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash commands to query local models with streaming support.
